comment.body:
we are above the monthly upsdie target, i took monthly profit, i'm fine.
to be honest, guys, i'm a bit lost now in this market, i need some hours to investigate and think about whats going on...

momentum is very agressive, very pushy.
stock to bond monthly beta is positive, spot to vol beta is also positive and growing,
institutional outflow into cash and bonds is record high this month again, 0DTE activity is up,
and risk seems to be held high on purpose...

its a trade war, it is a tactic like in february... i just don't udnerstand it yet.. i need some hours

comment.body: yeah I unsubscribed, honestly just look at back at all the posts, "no real investors" buying this market was the statement since April dip and keep delaying the "pullback" which she'll go all in for the next 2-3 years which now has no answer, sure there's a risk window open in the 2H of Sep not sure if that will come just in time correction or minor pullback. lol I'll def get a lot of shit for what I say here but this has been just a too careful theme since the April dip while the real returns would've came if buying the april dip and hold till now... I respect her for calling the tops previously but since then has just been underperforming the broad market for the mid-long term buyers

comment.body: I really don't know how people don't benefit from the lessons in interpreting how the profile can be leveraged with an if/then basis day to day?
